summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Live Infrastructure Visualization feature. All 43 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all live connection badges, stat cards, auto-refresh controls, and collapsible panels for Lambda, GitHub, S3, CloudWatch, Terraform, and CDK.
critical_code_review_comments: All AWS integrations (Lambda, S3, CloudWatch) are working with real credentials - no mocking
GitHub integration properly fetches repo info, commits, branches, and PRs
S3 prefix filtering works correctly with ?prefix=audio/ query parameter
CloudWatch alarms endpoint returns real alarm data with state (OK/ALARM/INSUFFICIENT_DATA)
Terraform modules and CDK constructs endpoints return structured metadata from local files
Overview endpoint properly includes live_connections field with all service statuses
Auto-refresh controls properly cycle through Off, 30s, 1m, 5m intervals
All data-testid attributes present for robust automated testing
seed_data_creation: None - all data from live AWS and GitHub APIs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Infrastructure Visualization feature fully functional. All AWS (Lambda, S3, CloudWatch) and GitHub endpoints return real data. Infrastructure tab accessible from /cve-management page. Components verified: connection status bar with badges, overview stat cards (8 cards), auto-refresh controls (Off/30s/1m/5m), Lambda Functions panel (9 functions with metrics), GitHub Repository panel (commits/branches/PRs tabs), S3 Artifacts panel (filter input + prefix buttons), CloudWatch Alarms panel (3 alarms all OK), Terraform Modules panel (12 modules, 40 resources), CDK Constructs panel (8 constructs).

backend_api_tests.live_status: PASS - returns connection status for Lambda, S3, GitHub with region/bucket/user info
backend_api_tests.lambda_live: PASS - returns 9 real Lambda functions with CloudWatch metrics (invocations, errors, duration, throttles)
backend_api_tests.github_runs: PASS - returns GitHub Actions workflow runs from johnlegerronspivey/bigmannentertainment repo
backend_api_tests.github_repo: PASS - returns repo info, 10 commits, 2 branches, 0 open PRs
backend_api_tests.s3_artifacts: PASS - returns 27 objects from bigmann-entertainment-media bucket
backend_api_tests.terraform_modules: PASS - returns 12 modules with 40 total resources
backend_api_tests.cdk_constructs: PASS - returns 8 constructs with service metadata
backend_api_tests.overview_live_connections: PASS - includes live_connections with all service statuses

frontend_ui.lambda_live_panel: PASS - shows 9 functions with memory, timeout, code size, handler, metrics
frontend_ui.github_repo_panel: PASS - shows repo info with Commits/Branches/PRs tabs
frontend_ui.s3_artifacts_panel: PASS - shows filter input, prefix buttons (/root, approved/, audio/, etc.), object list with size and storage class
frontend_ui.cloudwatch_alarms_panel: PASS - shows 3 alarms with metric, threshold, period, state (all OK)
frontend_ui.terraform_modules_panel: PASS - shows 12 modules with 40 resources, 2 environments
